title: ToolTreaux 30 Inch Telescoping Magnetic Pickup Tool for 15lb Magnetic Strength
description:
A handy tool to have around the home, garage, office, studio, workshop or stored in a toolbox, the ToolTreaux telescoping magnetic rod opens to a full 30 inches, allowing for quick and efficient retrieval of dropped bolts, metal nuts, screws, jewelry pieces and more that may have otherwise remained unreachable

ToolTreaux 30 Inch Telescoping Magnetic Pickup Tool for 15lb Magnetic Strength

A handy tool to have around the home, garage, office, studio, workshop or stored in a toolbox, the ToolTreaux telescoping magnetic rod opens to a full 30 inches, allowing for quick and efficient retrieval of dropped bolts, metal nuts, screws, jewelry pieces and more that may have otherwise remained unreachable.

Key Features

  • TELESCOPING MAGNETIC PICK UP TOOL: A handy tool to have around the home, garage, office, studio, workshop or stored in a tool box, the ToolTreaux telescoping magnetic rod opens to a full 30 inches, allowing for quick and efficient retrieval of dropped bolts, metal nuts, screws, jewelry pieces and more that may have otherwise remained unreachable
  • 15LBS MAGNETIC PICK UP STRENGTH: An indispensable tool for workshops and homes, the magnetic pick up tool with telescopic rod instantly picks up parts up to 15 pounds; the tool is incredibly convenient for projects or operations that work with small metal parts, improving efficiency and ensuring equipment is not lost on site
  • STAINLESS STEEL CONSTRUCTION: The telescoping magnetic pickup tool is made from durable stainless steel ensuring a long service life that will stand up to lots of wear and tear; the black cushion grip handle provides comfort and control over the movement of the telescoping magnetic sweeper
  • COMPACT DESIGN: When not in use, the telescoping magnetic pickup tool easily and quickly collapses in on itself by simply pushing the head and tail towards each other; when fully collapsed, the tool measures 7 inches, is lightweight at just 2.7 ounces and easy to carry on person or stow away in a tool box
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3.2 x 10.4 x 9.4 inches; Full Extension Length: 30 inches; Collapsed Length: 7 inches; Handle Length: 4.5 inches; Colors: Black, Red, Silver; Material: Stainless Steel

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT15LBPUT
  • UPC: 810058485885
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 30 in

An indispensable tool for workshops and homes, the magnetic pickup tool with telescopic rod instantly picks up parts weighing up to 15 pounds; the tool is incredibly convenient for projects or operations that work with small metal parts, improving efficiency and ensuring equipment is not lost on site!

The telescoping magnetic pickup tool is made from durable stainless steel ensuring a long service life that will stand up to lots of wear and tear, while the black cushion grip handle provides comfort and control over the movement of the telescoping magnetic sweeper. And, when not in use, the telescoping magnetic pickup tool easily and quickly collapses in on itself by simply pushing the head and tail towards each other; when fully collapsed, the tool measures 7 inches, is lightweight at just 2.7 ounces, and easy to carry on your person or stow away in a toolbox.

Dimensions: 3.2 x 10.4 x 9.4 inches
